_comment: External MCP servers Nexus will spawn on startup. Each entry: {name, command (shell-split), env (optional), enabled (optional, default true), skip_if_missing_env (optional, default true — skip if any env value is empty). Tools appear in Nexus as '<name>__<tool>'.

servers.name: github
servers.note: Fill GITHUB_TOKEN (and GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN) with a fine-grained PAT. The entry auto-skips while the values are empty so Nexus boots cleanly without a token.
